KEINEMOD-CONSUME.description: Move cards into your [gold]Scroll[/gold], trigger their [gold]Consumed[/gold] effects.
KEINEMOD-CONSUME.title: Consume
KEINEMOD-CREATE.description: Add cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold], Non-Status cards added gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
KEINEMOD-CREATE.title: Create
KEINEMOD-RECALL.description: Move cards from you [gold]Scroll[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], they cost [blue]1[/blue] less this turn and gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
KEINEMOD-RECALL.title: Recall
KEINEMOD-HUMAN.description: Gain additional effects if you are in [blue]Human[/blue] form.
KEINEMOD-HUMAN.title: Human
KEINEMOD-HAKUTAKU.description: Gain additional effects if you are in [green]Hakutaku[/green] form.
KEINEMOD-HAKUTAKU.title: Hakutaku
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGEABLE.description: This card's damage and [gold]Block[/gold] scales X times with your [gold]Knowledge[/gold].
KEINEMOD-KNOWLEDGEABLE.title: Knowledgeable X
